svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="bWmWELu9ZsZHv5BNYSLq" name="Page-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="663" dy="726" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#EEEDFE;strokeColor=#534AB7;fontColor=#534AB7;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=0;" value="Styrings- og koordineringslag" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="360" x="390" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="ISO 22320 - Crisis coordination" link="#iso-22320" id="L1box"> <mxCell parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=10;fillColor=#CECBF6;strokeColor=#534AB7;fontColor=#26215C;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacingTop=0;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="320" x="408" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <mxCell id="L2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#E6F1FB;strokeColor=#185FA5;fontColor=#185FA5;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=0;" value="Proces- og ledelseslag" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="360" x="390" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="ISO 27035 - Incident lifecycle" link="#iso-27035" id="L2box"> <mxCell parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=10;fillColor=#B5D4F4;strokeColor=#185FA5;fontColor=#042C53;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="320" x="408" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <mxCell id="L3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#E1F5EE;strokeColor=#0F6E56;fontColor=#0F6E56;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=0;" value="Det operationelle indsatslag" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="360" x="390" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="NIST SP 800-61 - Detection & response" link="#nist-800-61" id="L3box"> <mxCell parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=10;fillColor=#9FE1CB;strokeColor=#0F6E56;fontColor=#04342C;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="320" x="408" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <mxCell id="L4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#FAEEDA;strokeColor=#854F0B;fontColor=#854F0B;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=0;" value="Kontrol- og funktionslag" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="360" x="390" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="NIST SP 800-53 - Security controls" link="#nist-800-53" id="L4box"> <mxCell parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=10;fillColor=#FAC775;strokeColor=#854F0B;fontColor=#412402;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="320" x="408" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <UserObject label="Virksomhedens kapacitet til håndtering af hændelser 
(Integrated governance, process & response)" link="#all" id="CORE"> <mxCell parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=8;fillColor=#F1EFE8;strokeColor=#5F5E5A;fontColor=#2C2C2A;fontSize=12;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="308" x="414" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> <mxCell id="A1" edge="1" parent="1" source="L1box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#888780;strokeWidth=1.5;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;" target="L2box" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A2" edge="1" parent="1" source="L2box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#888780;strokeWidth=1.5;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;" target="L3box" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A3" edge="1" parent="1" source="L3box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#888780;strokeWidth=1.5;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;" target="L4box" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A4" edge="1" parent="1" source="L4box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#888780;strokeWidth=1.5;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;startArrow=classic;startFill=1;" target="CORE" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
